response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in C++ (notably in embedded systems and LabWindows/CVI) and SQL, but lacks recent, direct experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking. Their domain expertise is in web/mobile development, geospatial tools, and general software engineering, with no explicit mention of financial systems or derivatives. While their technical skills are strong, the misalignment with the financial domain reduces their fit for this role.
strengths: Strong C++ development experience with 5+ years (including LabWindows/CVI and embedded systems)
Professional SQL experience with SQL Server/Oracle equivalents (MongoDB, MySQL)
Excellent communication skills (evidenced by workshops, talks, and open-source contributions)
concerns: No demonstrated experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains
Recent roles heavily focused on Node.js/JavaScript and AI-agent infrastructure, not C++
Lacks mandatory domain expertise (fixed income/fixed income derivatives or capital markets investment banking)

key_factors.factor: Domain expertise in capital markets/financial systems
Recent relevance of technical skills to role requirements
